title: Project: Playtime
description: The mod adds content from the game PoppyPlaytime
body:
(an update in the development process)

**_This is a fan version of the Minecraft mod dedicated to Poppy Playtime. The official developer of the game is Mob Entertainment, all rights belong to them_**

![https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/19c2d7f9-2fd4-4560-900a-6e552dc15529.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/19c2d7f9-2fd4-4560-900a-6e552dc15529.webp)
# https://www.bisecthosting.com/btxdxd
---
## [Discord](https://discord.gg/dSwQN8mQqC) - [Telegram](https://t.me/btxdxdxd) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCP7sD1kKHXRTjTSmVlGI7KQ)
![jtpjptc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d69a3e09a0c06dabbf1d3382ff10beaed4ec121.png)
#
![Be sure to...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/276bb5b31778727e3555f5d294192980eb42ff43.png)
![One of the best...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e4670490aa1a7c6e6df5320e02448b0da76961.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mDHvn9LAuT0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This mod will add content from all parts of Poppy Playtime. It contains well-developed models and textures of grabpacks/hands and blocks.

# Hands
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/l81jNUpFk1U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To change hands press:
RIGHT HAND:

V + RMB = Blue (1.01+)

G + RMB = Red

H + RMB = Green

B + RMB = Orange

N + RMB = Purple

LEFT HAND:

V + LMB = Blue (1.01+)

G + LMB = Red (1.01+)

H + LMB = Green (1.01+)

B + LMB = Orange (1.01+)

N + LMB = Purple (1.01+)

# Scanners settings
![Scaners settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e8172ac4f44a4e3ccb514cc99d3be237a08c944.png)

Each time the mod will be updated and become better!
